page_metadata.biotools__summary: FastMulRFS is a pipeline for estimating species trees from multi-copy gene trees, based on the Robinson-Foulds supertree problem for MUL-trees (MulRF).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FastMulRFS is a pipeline for estimating species trees from multi-copy gene trees, based on the Robinson-Foulds supertree problem for MUL-trees (MulRF).
